hero.title: Discover Seville through its flavors
hero.subtitle: Unique gastronomic tours that connect you with the authentic culinary culture of Andalusia

home.aboutText: We are passionate about Sevillian gastronomy and want to share with you the culinary secrets that make our city a unique destination. Each tour is a carefully designed sensory adventure.
home.featuredSubtitle: Gastronomic experiences that will connect you with the essence of Seville
home.ctaText: Book now and discover why we are the highest-rated food tour in Seville

tours.title: Our Tours
tours.subtitle: Gastronomic experiences designed for all palates

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Passion for Sevillian gastronomy since 2015
about.storyText1: Golden Bite was born from a dream: to share the gastronomic richness of Seville with the world. Founded by María and Antonio, two Sevillians passionate about their land, our company started as a small family project.
about.storyText2: Today, after more than 8 years and thousands of satisfied travelers, we continue to maintain the same philosophy: offering authentic experiences, away from mass tourism, that connect our visitors with the true essence of Andalusian cuisine.
about.missionText: To create memorable gastronomic experiences that celebrate the rich culinary tradition of Seville, supporting local producers and preserving century-old recipes.
about.value1Text: We only visit places frequented by Sevillians, away from conventional tourist routes.
about.value2Text: We work with local producers and establishments that share our passion for excellence.
about.value3Text: We support the local economy and promote responsible gastronomic practices.
about.teamSubtitle: Local guides passionate about sharing their culture
